name: Matte Finish 2-Tier Fruit Basket - Threshold™
description: Store all your fruits and vegetables in this smartly designed Matte Finish 2-Tier Fruit Basket from Threshold. The sleek design paired with matte finish, goes perfectly well with any decor. With double the storage and half the space, this wire fruit basket also looks great in any kitchen or dining area. You can depend on this to keep apples, onions and other produce together until you're ready to eat.
